summary: Complete frontend testing of Melus AI Landing Page (Emergent.sh replica). All 15 features tested and verified working correctly. The landing page displays for unauthenticated users at '/' route with all required UI elements and functionality.
test_credentials: None required - tested as unauthenticated user
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - testing unauthenticated landing page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page fully functional for unauthenticated users. All auth buttons have correct data-testid attributes. Carousel auto-rotates every 4 seconds.

features_tested.landing_page_loads_unauthenticated: PASS - Landing page loads correctly at '/' for unauthenticated users
features_tested.yc_badge_visible: PASS - Y Combinator S24 badge is visible with orange styling
features_tested.animated_e_logo: PASS - Animated 'e' logo displayed with glow effect and pulse animation
features_tested.title_with_gradient: PASS - 'Build Full-Stack Web & Mobile Apps in minutes' visible with cyan-blue gradient
features_tested.apple_facebook_disabled: PASS - Both buttons disabled with 'Coming soon' title attribute
features_tested.or_separator: PASS - 'OR' separator visible between social buttons and email option
features_tested.email_form_email_field: PASS - data-testid='email-input' visible when form opened
features_tested.email_form_password_field: PASS - data-testid='password-input' visible when form opened
features_tested.email_form_back_button: PASS - 'Back' button returns to main auth options
features_tested.signup_signin_toggle: PASS - Toggle changes button text from 'Sign In' to 'Create Account'
features_tested.right_panel_carousel: PASS - Cyan/turquoise panel with auto-rotating slides ($100M ARR, 500K+, 10x Faster)
features_tested.carousel_auto_rotation: PASS - Carousel auto-rotates between slides every 4 seconds
features_tested.terms_privacy_links: PASS - Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links visible at bottom
features_tested.animated_code_background: PASS - Canvas element present for Matrix-style animated code background

ui_elements_verified.yc_badge: Orange badge with 'Y' logo and 'Combinator S24' text
ui_elements_verified.logo: Animated 'e' letter with glow effect and pulse animation
ui_elements_verified.title: Two-line title with white 'Build Full-Stack' and gradient 'Web & Mobile Apps in minutes'
ui_elements_verified.google_button: Full-width button with Google colored icon and 'Continue with Google' text
ui_elements_verified.email_form: Email input, Password input, Sign In/Create Account button, Back button, Sign Up/Sign In toggle
ui_elements_verified.right_panel: Cyan gradient panel with carousel card showing metrics and celebration emoji
ui_elements_verified.terms_footer: Gray text with underlined Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links

mocked_apis.note: Using real backend auth endpoints. OAuth flows require valid credentials.
